title: Status Effect HUD
description: This adds status effects to the HUD using HUD Lib.
body:
# Status Effect HUD

Status Effect HUD adds a HUD for the status effects currently applied, including the time left and the amplifier of it, it has options to change the color, background color. To open configuration press `RIGHT SHIFT`, from here you can reposition it and view further options through the "Settings" button. This mod relies on [HUD Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-lib).

## Screenshot

Here is Status Effect HUD with the default configuration, the position, and colors can be changed.
![Status Effect HUD with default configuration positioned on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9snnMU8p/images/e52fc66f713bb83fef21d39eb86dcc085449ade6.png)
